# Inflexions I.T. Services
> Enterprise IT Solutions & Integration — Accra, Ghana

Inflexions I.T. Services Ltd is a privately-owned enterprise IT integration company founded in 2012 in Accra, Ghana. We design, deploy, and manage intelligent IT infrastructure — combining network engineering, cloud architecture, cybersecurity, and data-centric solutions with AI-driven automation to deliver measurable business outcomes.

## Services
- Professional Services: IT assessments, AI strategy workshops, cloud migration planning, digital transformation consulting, solution architecture
- Managed Services: AIOps-driven 24/7 monitoring, automated remediation, patch management, security oversight, dedicated account management
- Support Services: Multi-tier support (L1, L2, L3), AI-powered ticketing, automated diagnostics, on-site and remote break/fix

## Solutions
- Data-centric Solutions: Data architecture, business intelligence, predictive analytics, AI-driven process automation, real-time data pipelines, data warehousing, governance frameworks
- Cloud Services: Cloud strategy, migration (lift & shift, re-platform, re-architect), hybrid and multi-cloud, FinOps, cloud-native development
- Data Security: Endpoint protection, SIEM & SOC, identity and access management, data loss prevention, compliance and audit
- Network Infrastructure: SD-WAN, enterprise switching, wireless networking, network security, performance optimisation

## AI & Intelligent Automation Capabilities
- Predictive Analytics: Demand forecasting, anomaly detection, real-time operational dashboards
- Process Automation: Workflow orchestration, intelligent document processing, robotic process automation (RPA)
- Data Strategy & Architecture: Data warehousing, pipeline design, governance frameworks
- AI Integration: Embedding machine-learning models into existing business systems, API-first, vendor-neutral deployment

## Technology Partners
Microsoft, Cisco, Google, HP, Dell, Anthropic, Sophos, Cloudflare, Amazon, Lenovo, Huawei, ESET, APC / Schneider Electric, DigitalOcean, Red Hat, Avaya, Hikvision

## Frontier AI Lab Partners
Google, Anthropic, OpenAI, xAI
